3271820.name: Squink
3271820.description:
You are a Squid trying to escape the seemingly endless office, but the only way you can move is blasting yourself around with explosions. Build up momentum to clear jumps and avoid falling back down.

Don't worry it wont take you long to get back up... unless you fall again.

Online Co-op/Multiplayer:

Don't fall all by yourself you can play with anyone on your Steam friend list!

Gameplay:

This is a rocket jumping game where you progress through increasingly more difficult jumps.

All you have to do is: Aim and Shoot at the floor

  • Build up momentum with your ink blasts

  • Fly across large gaps

  • Bonk your head against a wall

  • Fall all the way back down

  • Shoot two bubbles together and launch yourself into it for a massive boost in the air

  • Every success and failure is auto saved

As you ascend through the office you will endure many hardships:

  • Waterfalls

  • Disappearing blocks

  • Hanging boxes

  • Angry managers

  • And much more!

Atmosphere:

You'll get enraged at some point, but that cute squid smile and fast speed with bring you right back to loving it!

  • 4 layers each with unique environments

  • A soundtrack containing songs for each layer

  • New collectable colors and hats for your Squid to wear!

  • Cute NPCs you can chat with as you climb

  • Everything hand drawn with a trackpad

"Yes, my fellow Squinks will tremble as they watch me splatter and soar!"

 -Squink
